description.ko: 라벤더빛 성간 먼지를 빨아들이는 블랙홀의 웅장한 모습으로, 무한한 우주 심연의 규모와 침묵을 탐구합니다.
description.en: A majestic view of a black hole pulling in lavender stardust, exploring the scale and silence of the infinite cosmic abyss.

prompt: A cinematic 8k render of VOID-3, titled 'The Singularity’s Halo.' A massive swirling vortex of #0D0221 obsidian dark matter pulling gossamer-thin #7B68EE lavender nebula tendrils into a gravitational singularity. Distant #E6E6FA soft lavender star clusters flicker through thick cosmic dust, creating a lens-warping gravitational lensing effect. The atmosphere conveys infinite scale and silent majesty, with volumetric lighting and hyper-realistic space photography aesthetic. Capturing the divine horror and beauty of the deep universe.
